title: Cow Girls
description: This texture pack transforms Minecraft’s cows into cow girls
body:
This texture pack transforms Minecraft’s cows into cow girls — a fun play on words that gives these peaceful mobs a cute humanoid design while keeping their original sounds and behavior.
The pack adds expressive faces, detailed textures, and small animations that bring charm and personality to your pastures.

It requires Optifine to work properly, or any other mod that supports CEM (Custom Entity Models) such as EMF (Entity Model Features) and ETF (Entity Texture Features).
It works on Minecraft versions higher than 1.21.5
